description: Autonomous improvements to the SEO content engine

userStories.title: Add content pipeline health dashboard API
userStories.description: As an agency operator, I want the /api/status endpoint to also return pipeline counts (topics, research, drafts, published, review-required) so the dashboard shows content flow metrics
acceptanceCriteria: API returns pipeline counts per directory

userStories.title: Add client directory listing to dashboard API
userStories.description: As an agency operator, I want the dashboard to show all onboarded clients from clients/ directory with their config.json summary
acceptanceCriteria: API returns client list with name, website, article target

userStories.title: Wire scrub command to auto-run on all new drafts
userStories.description: As a content producer, I want the /write command's agent cascade to include /scrub as the first step to remove AI watermarks before SEO optimization

userStories.title: Add content calendar command
userStories.description: As an agency operator, I want a /calendar command that generates a visual content calendar from all client content plans, showing what's due when
acceptanceCriteria: Outputs merged calendar sorted by date

userStories.title: Add automated quality scoring to published articles
userStories.description: As a content producer, I want every article that moves to published/ to automatically get a quality score logged, tracking improvement over time
acceptanceCriteria: Each entry has: date, article, scores, composite
